zh.title: 以太坊/美元技术分析：短线震荡偏强，多头仍占优势
zh.content:
当前ETH/USD报1621.97美元，24小时微跌0.54%，价格运行于日内区间1619.48至1631.47之间。从趋势结构看，价格持续位于20日均线1593.50上方，显示中短期多头格局尚未破坏，但上涨动能有所放缓，市场进入高位整理阶段。

技术指标方面，MACD数值为11.92，保持在零轴上方，反映中期趋势依然偏多，买盘力量尚存。尽管RSI数据缺失，结合价格表现观察，当前市场并未出现明显超买或超卖信号，短线更倾向于震荡蓄势后选择方向。

关键位置上，下方首要支撑位位于1619美元附近，为日内低点区域；若跌破则可能回测1600美元整数关口及20日均线1593美元一线。上方阻力位关注1631美元，进一步突破后有望挑战1650美元至1670美元区间，打开新的上涨空间。

交易策略方面，激进投资者可关注1619至1600美元区域的回踩做多机会，止损设于1590美元下方；稳健投资者则可等待有效突破1631美元后顺势跟进。整体来看，在价格维持于20日均线之上期间，逢低布局仍优于追空，但需警惕突破失败引发的短线回调风险。

en.title: Ethereum vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Ethereum is trading at 1621.97, posting a modest 24-hour decline of 0.54% while remaining confined to a relatively narrow intraday range between 1619.48 and 1631.47. Despite the mild pullback, price action continues to hold above the 20-period simple moving average at 1593.50, suggesting that the broader short-term structure remains constructive. Buyers have so far defended higher levels, indicating that bearish momentum has not yet gained meaningful control.

The position above the SMA(20) implies that market sentiment retains a cautiously bullish bias, with participants still willing to accumulate on dips. MACD stands at 11.92, a positive reading that typically reflects underlying upward momentum. However, the absence of a signal line limits confirmation of trend strength and potential crossover analysis. Likewise, without an RSI(14) reading, it is difficult to determine whether Ethereum is approaching overbought or oversold conditions, warranting a degree of caution.

Immediate support appears near the session low around 1619.50, which has already attracted buying interest. A more significant support zone can be identified near the SMA(20) at approximately 1593.50, where trend-following participants may re-enter the market. On the upside, resistance is developing around 1631.50, corresponding with the recent high. A decisive break above this barrier could open the path toward additional recovery, while failure to sustain current levels may encourage renewed selling pressure.

For traders, patience and confirmation remain essential. Aggressive participants may consider bullish setups on successful retests of support, particularly if momentum indicators continue to strengthen. Conservative traders could wait for a confirmed breakout above 1631.50 before initiating long exposure. Conversely, a breakdown below the 1593.50 region may signal weakening market structure and justify tighter risk controls or defensive positioning. Sound position sizing and disciplined stop-loss placement remain critical in the current environment.
